text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's good bye old year, hello new! Right, Trainer?
And that's what I came here for.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So, yeah... Happy New Year! I'm lookin' forward
to training hard again together this year.
choice_data_list: Whoa, that was more formal than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've gotta be! My mom told me I have to do
New Year's greetings properly.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't do stuff if it doesn't have purpose, which
means my comin' here's not just for show. You'll
be doing a lot for me this year.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So, about my resolution for this year... I guess I
don't even have to say it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be the coolest! That's it! That's all there
is for me!
choice_data_list: By the way, what was your resolution last year?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: To be cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: To try and be cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They're not the same! It gets upgraded a little
every year.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And on top of that, I have another big goal this
year: the Derby.
choice_data_list: What if you made that your resolution?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh! Nice! Yeah, let's do that.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna dream big and dominate the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And so, I wanted do a little somethin' for the new
year to get off on the right foot.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ya know, like... some superstitious stuff to ensure
victory or somethin'.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So, think of somethin' that suits me and I'll do
that over the rest of the break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... A New Year's activity that suits Vodka... I
wonder what would be best...
choice_data_list: Spend the break on some wheels.
Go ape and put your pedal to the mental.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
A shrine maiden? I don't think the cutesy look
suits me though.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hm, wait. Now that I think about it, I do know a
shrine that does a lucky event like that every
year. All right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Vodka competes in a good-luck race at a
shrine. As for the results...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeahhh! I did it! I'm the lucky maiden of the year!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep goin' like this for the whole year!
Oh yeahhh!

text_block_list.name: Shrine Visitors
text_block_list.text: Lucky maiden! Lucky maiden!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheers erupt for Vodka's victory. It seems she's
already raised her speed this year!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wheels? You mean like a motorcycle? I don't
have one though.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But if you can get me on one, I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Man, this motorcycle game is sick! It feels like I'm
drivin' the real thing!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I wanna spend the whole break doin' this! Trainer,
lighten up my trainin' schedule, will ya?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka spends most of her New Year's break at
the arcade. She seems to have enjoyed her time
off.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh... What is there to go ape on over New
Year's break? My homework?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Like, you want me go "mental" and hit some
books? I don't really get it, but I'll give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Man, why do we have to visit the library on break? This book... Human Ancestry Quiz?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So I just gotta memorize this and get the
questions correct? This is the Peking Man, and
this is the Java Man! How was that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka goes absolutely primal on her studies for
the entire break. She seems to come out with
more knowledge and broadened horizons.
